# Yusuke Morishita

## About
Yusuke Morishita is a mobile software engineer based in North Vancouver, BC, Canada, with over 9 years of professional experience building iOS applications.

## Contact
- Email: hello@yusuke.ca
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yusukeca/
- GitHub: https://github.com/yysskk

## Skills
- Primary: Swift, SwiftUI, Objective-C
- Mobile: Kotlin, Flutter
- Web: TypeScript, Next.js, React

## Career
- SmartNews — Tech Lead, iOS/Android (2020–2024)
- CyberAgent — Software Engineer, iOS (2017–2020)

## Open Source
- SwipeMenuViewController: Swipable tab and menu UI for iOS — https://github.com/yysskk/SwipeMenuViewController
- swift-nostr: Nostr protocol client in Swift — https://github.com/yysskk/swift-nostr
- swift-mockable: Mock generation for Swift testing — https://github.com/yysskk/swift-mockable

## Education
- Osaka Prefecture University — Bachelor of Mechanical Engineering
